review_title: Efficient LinkedIn Outreach with Minor Limitations
author: OSAMAH S.
pros: Jobin.cloud offers an intuitive interface for managing LinkedIn outreach and CRM, automation features for lead generation, and integration with multiple platforms, making it efficient for tracking and managing connections and communications.
cons: Jobin.cloud can be limited in customization options, and some users may find the learning curve for certain features steep. Additionally, occasional syncing issues with LinkedIn might disrupt workflows.

It’s like having an extra team member on board, working 24/7 to keep things running smoothly. If you’re serious about efficiency and growth, Jobin.cloud is the tool you need! Big shoutout to [sensitive content hidden] for delivering great product training

review_title: LinkedIn Data Extractor, Bulk Messenger & Automated Messaging Looks Legit!
description: It looks like a pretty good piece of software, as long as the pricing doesn't get crazy.
author: Steve M.
pros: I'm still feeling it out since I just got on the Free Trial, but so far, so good!
cons: It looks like they might have some type of enrichment/verification limits on contact records that you pull in from LinkedIn, which would be disappointing if that's the case... I'm going to try to clarify with sales or support tomorrow.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Heather L.
pros: I literally love everything about it. See my notes on each specific feature for a deeper understanding.
cons: Literally, not one comes to mind. They’ve mapped the lifecycle of any recruitment and/or business development strategy and operationalized it with user-friendly, easy-adoption.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I've been using Jobin.cloud primarily for its candidate search functionality, and I'm thoroughly impressed. The platform's search capabilities are robust and efficient, allowing me to quickly find qualified candidates that fit my specific criteria. The advanced filters make the process seamless, enabling me to narrow down candidates based on skills, experience, location, and more. This has significantly streamlined my recruitment process, saving me valuable time and resources. the customer support team at Jobin.cloud has been exceptional. They are always responsive and eager to help with any inquiries or issues that arise.
cons: It's hard for me to say because I have little experience with this service. Now I really like everything :)
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Jobin could be a game changer
author: Thom A.
pros: I have been a Loxo user for 6 yr and if Loxo closed tomorrow this the ATS I would use. I am still thinking of trying to incorporate it into my day-to-day just for the LinkedIn connection system and the data enrichment. If you are shopping for a new ATS you have to check this out. It is not perfect but it has some amazing features that I wished my ATS has. The ability to parse hundreds of linked in profiles at a time and then mass connection request them is worth the price alone.
cons: no CRM drip campaign feature. No Iphone app (that I know of)
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Best customer service and easy to use product!
description: Mikel is the absolute best when it comes to response time and customer service. I feel like he never sleeps because he always responds promptly and is so nice and helpful!
author: Shelley R.
pros: Jobin.cloud has been a great tool for our start up Executive Search firm! I have used Bullhorn products previously which have all the bells and whistles, but Jobin does everything we need it to do as we are growing our company. The best part for us is using it to source on Linkedin without the normal limitations. That has been game changer.
cons: I think there are still functions missing that can be added over time. One thing I would love to be able to do is send emails to our clients through Jobin with our candidate presentations so it can all be tracked in one place.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: One-stop Solution for Streamlined Networking and Engagement
description: Despite a few drawbacks, my experience with Jobin.cloud has been overwhelmingly positive. The platform has streamlined my networking efforts and allowed me to engage with the right people quickly and efficiently. The ability to track conversations with timelines, tags, and notes keeps me organized and helps me maintain meaningful connections.
author: Martin S.
pros: Jobin.cloud has truly transformed my networking experience. I appreciate how easy it is to import, filter, and manage profiles in bulk. The auto-updating repositories save me a lot of time, and the smart templates make outreach effortless. I've found the unlimited LinkedIn connection requests to be especially valuable in expanding my professional network.
cons: Although Jobin.cloud is overall an excellent platform, I've encountered a few minor issues. Sometimes, the auto-found emails aren't accurate, leading to wasted time and effort. Additionally, the user interface could be more intuitive, as I initially struggled to navigate through the platform.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Simple to use, easily one of the most straightforward automation tools for LinkedIn candidate outreach
cons: Ability to view contact notes and re-contact scheduling is not straightforward
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Awesome! The best! Fantastic! go for it! I guarantee they will be the number one in a years time. Its just that no body knows them as they haven't made aggressive marketing but get in now when no body knows about it and use to your edge.
author: Imran Y.
pros: I have tested atleast 20 linkedin and email automation tool. Jobin is far the best, so intuitive and had amazing features. Others boost about it but at execution they are not even 10%. Jobin is as smooth and user friendly at it can be. But most importantly I literally haven't seen a better customer service. I feel bad they have such an amazing customer service for so low paid subscription. Imagine that!
cons: Ah the compaign reporting feature... This is so important and this is the only thing missing which is in the pipe line I just cant wait it to be on
